title: Buttery Crispy Filipino Stir-fry with Smoked Turkey Neck
description: This energizing dish features smoked turkey neck in a buttery, crispy sauce perfect for breakfast or snack.
instructions: Season turkey neck with white pepper and red chilli flakes. Place on a greased baking sheet and broil for about 8-10 minutes until crispy.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add garlic slices and sauté until golden brown, stirring occasionally, then add soy sauce, cooking until slightly reduced.
Gently place the crumbed turkey neck into the pan with the stir-fry mixture and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, ensuring both are heated thoroughly.
Serve hot as a snack or breakfast accompaniment.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
